title: Public Health Agency of Canada corporate management reporting - Canada.ca
content:
## Public Health Agency of Canada corporate management reporting
Evaluations, plans and priorities, performance, finances and audits.
Evaluations that support government accountability and decision making on policy, expenditure management and program improvements.
Annual reports on our priorities, programs, expected results and expenditure plans.

## Departmental Results Reports
Departmental reports used to measure performance against what's outlined in the reports on plans and priorities.

## Quarterly financial reports
Year-to-date highlights, information on risks, and changes to operations, personnel and programs.
Internal audits of resources, systems, processes, structures and operational tasks.
Annual reports on fees

## Forced labour in Canadian supply chains
Access annual reports on how the Public Health Agency of Canada is preventing and reducing the risk of forced labour and child labour in Canadian supply chains.

## Addressing Misconduct and Wrongdoing Annual Reports
Access annual reports on our ongoing efforts to address misconduct and wrongdoing in the workplace.
